categories.name: Network Forensics (PCAP)
categories.description: Master traffic analysis through Wireshark, tshark, and protocol dissection. Learn to identify malicious communications, extract artifacts, and reconstruct attack narratives from packet captures.

categories.name: Memory Forensics
categories.description: Analyze volatile memory dumps using Volatility to uncover running processes, injected code, network connections, and evidence of compromise.

categories.name: Disk & Filesystem Forensics
categories.description: Investigate disk images, recover deleted files, analyze filesystem artifacts, and trace user activity through registry hives and event logs.

categories.name: Log Analysis & SIEM
categories.description: Parse and correlate logs from multiple sources to detect intrusions, lateral movement, and data exfiltration using SIEM techniques.

categories.name: Malware Analysis
categories.description: Perform static and dynamic analysis of malicious samples. Understand packing, obfuscation, C2 communication, and persistence mechanisms.

categories.name: Incident Response
categories.description: End-to-end incident response scenarios combining multiple forensic disciplines. Practice triage, containment, eradication, and reporting.
